description_long: This is a male construction worker figure standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. He is dressed in a light green short-sleeve shirt layered over a long-sleeve gray undershirt, paired with dark gray work pants and gray shoes. The figure wears a harness or strap system over his torso, crossing at the back and front, which is typical for safety gear but lacks a high-visibility vest. His hair is styled in short, textured curls, and his facial features are well-defined. The shoes appear to be sturdy but do not resemble heavy-duty work boots. No helmet, tool belt, or other construction accessories are visible.
description: A male construction worker in a green shirt, gray undershirt, dark pants, and harness, standing upright with defined facial features and casual shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green shirt, harness, gray undershirt, dark pants, and facial details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the harness, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the crossed harness straps, back of the shirt, and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, harness, and the fit of the clothing.
